name: AO.920.PRM.OSKernel
title: AO.920.PRM.OSKernel
body:
# AO.920.PRM.OSKernel — Prompt OS Kernel

## 🔖 PRIMARY FUNCTION:
Create a **modular, recursive, and auto-auditing Prompt Operating System** that enables the generation, evaluation, storage, and dynamic deployment of high-quality prompts across any domain.

---

## 🏛️ SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE

### 1. PromptForge v2.0
- **Function**: Generates prompts via vector cross-mapping.
- **Input Vectors**: Cognitive Mode, Function, Use Case, Domain, Output Type
- **Output**: 5-10 fireproofed prompts per batch
- **Modules**:
  - Forge Engine Core
  - Vector Matrix Handler
  - MetaPrompt Composer

### 2. Prompt Memory Scanner
- **Function**: Prevents duplication by analyzing semantic and structural fingerprints of all stored prompts.
- **Mechanisms**:
  - Latent Intent Comparison
  - Title/Instruction Overlap Detection
  - Concept Drift Detection

### 3. Concept Matrix Seeder
- **Function**: Seeds Forge Engine with reusable prompt skeletons.
- **Seed Vectors**:
  - Prompt Frame Type
  - Intended Action
  - Target Audience
  - Structural Constraints

### 4. ELos Prompt Audit Engine
- **Function**: Rates every prompt on 10 dimensions with 0–10 scoring.
- **Dimensions**:
  1. Clarity
  2. Specificity
  3. Originality
  4. Utility
  5. Tone Control
  6. Consistency
  7. Format Fidelity
  8. Semantic Integrity
  9. Goal Alignment
  10. Execution Readiness
- **Threshold**: Only prompts ≥ 90/100 are approved

---

## 🔍 SYSTEM FUNCTIONS

### !forge [topic/category]
Triggers PromptForge v2.0 with topic vector input. Returns batch.

### !audit [prompt-id/title]
Runs full audit and outputs 10-dimension score + improvement vector.

### !prompt [id]
Fetches prompt from library.

### !upgrade [id]
Triggers re-forging + audit if prompt < 90/100.

### !seedmatrix
Displays matrix skeletons to customize generation logic.

---

## 🖇️ CANVAS REGISTRATION

All canvases below are assigned to the **Prompt OS Kernel (AO.920.PRM.OSKernel)** master registry.

### New Canvases:
- AO.921.FRG — PromptForge v2.0 Engine Core (Populated)
- AO.922.MEM — Prompt Memory Scanner Logic
- AO.923.MTX — Concept Matrix Seeder
- AO.924.AUD — Prompt Audit Engine v2.0

### Previously Existing (Now Indexed Under Kernel):
- AO.910.PRM.LIB — Prompt Library
- AO.940.PRM.PromptForge — Legacy Prompt Forge (deprecated post-v2.0)
- AO.200.CNS — Consistency Auditor
- AO.100.PRS — Prompt Surgeon Logic
- EL.002.STG — Stargate Protocol v3.1
- EL.003.DVR — DiVeRSe MetaPrompt Protocol

---

## 🚀 BOOTLOADER INDEXING

### Active Modules (Auto-load during !boot):
- AO.920.PRM.OSKernel
- AO.921.FRG
- AO.922.MEM
- AO.923.MTX
- AO.924.AUD
- AO.910.PRM.LIB (full prompt access)
- AO.940.PRM.PromptForge (for legacy access only)
- EL.002.STG (shared fireproofing stack)

---

## ⚖️ GOVERNANCE
- All prompt creation must pass through the kernel.
- All audits enforced by AO.924.AUD engine.
- No prompt approved under 90/100 without explicit override from Captain.

---

Prompt OS Kernel Initialized ✅

name: AO.920.CMD.PromptOSCommandRegistry
title: AO.920.CMD.PromptOSCommandRegistry
body:
Canvas ID: AO.920.CMD.PromptOSCommandRegistry
Title: Prompt OS Command Registry – Full !Command Reference
System: Prompt OS Kernel v2.0
Bootloader: AO.000.BOOT
Status: 🔒 Fireproofed | 🧠 Bootloader-Enabled | 📡 Context-Aware

---

✅ MASTER !COMMAND REGISTRY

Last Sync: Current
Kernel: Prompt OS Kernel v2.0

---

🧭 CORE SYSTEM COMMANDS

| Command       | Function                                                           |
|---------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------|
| !boot         | Load entire system kernel: all canvases, prompts, layers          |
| !help         | Summary of available commands in current context                  |
| !status       | Current system state + diagnostics summary                        |
| !commands     | List of all available !commands (this list)                       |

---

📚 PROMPT LIBRARY COMMANDS

| Command               | Function                                                     |
|-----------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| !prompt [id/title]    | Retrieve a specific prompt from AO.910.PRM.LIB               |
| !category [name]      | View all prompts in a specific category                      |
| !listprompts          | List all prompt IDs and titles (with category grouping)      |
| !search [keyword]     | Search prompts by keyword or domain                          |

---

🔨 FORGING & CREATION COMMANDS

| Command               | Function                                                     |
|-----------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| !forge [topic]        | Generate 10 prompts on a topic using PromptForge v2.0        |
| !forgebatch           | Trigger batch generation from Concept Matrix Seeder          |
| !seedmatrix           | View/modify concept prompt skeletons (Seeder system)         |
| !newcategory          | Initialize a new category before forging                     |

---

🔍 AUDIT & OPTIMIZATION COMMANDS

| Command               | Function                                                     |
|-----------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| !audit [id]           | Run 10-vector audit on a prompt (clarity, tone, utility, etc.)|
| !auditall             | Audit all prompts in library                                 |
| !upgrade [id]         | Optimize + re-audit a low-score prompt                      |
| !upgradelow           | Upgrade all prompts scoring below 90                         |

---

🔐 SYSTEM MODULES & AGENTS

| Command               | Function                                                     |
|-----------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| !load [canvas/agent]  | Load any registered canvas, persona, or system layer         |
| !activate [agent]     | Activate a support persona (e.g., Auditor, Builder, etc.)    |
| !lock [id]            | Lock a prompt for immutability                               |
| !unlock [id]          | Unlock for editing                                            |
| !fireproof [id]       | Run Stargate post-processing manually                        |

---

📊 UTILITIES & EXPORT

| Command                  | Function                                                     |
|--------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| !json [id/category/all]  | Export prompt(s) in JSON format                              |
| !md [id/category]        | Export as Markdown block                                     |
| !countprompts            | Show total prompt count + category breakdown                 |
| !showregistry            | Display full canvas and Dewey registry for Prompt OS Kernel  |

---

🧪 DEBUG & TEST MODE (Admin Only)

| Command               | Function                                                     |
|-----------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| !simulate [scenario]  | Run test scenarios on new prompt categories                  |
| !stress               | Trigger redundancy + latency scan on library                 |
| !flushcache           | Clear temp logic from volatile memory (non-persistent)       |
| !rebuildkernel        | Recompile Prompt OS Kernel from live canvases                |

---

🔁 Integrated with PersonalPromptCenter, DynamicNudger, and AutoAssembler subsystems.

🔥 All commands loaded at boot. Canvas registered to UI Registry for real-time lookup.

name: IN.110.IDE_Identity_Engine
title: Identity Engine – Belief Overrides, Embedded Narratives, Interrupt Protocols
body:
**Dewey Decimal:** IN.110.IDE
**Title:** Identity Engine – Belief Overrides, Embedded Narratives, Interrupt Protocols
**System Classification:** MIND OS → Identity Stack

---

### I. Purpose
To operationalize upgraded belief structures by embedding them directly into the behavioral logic and override systems of the Allon OS. The Identity Engine functions as a centralized logic layer responsible for intercepting legacy beliefs, enforcing rewrites, and enabling emotional discipline through structural recursion.

---

### II. Core Inputs: Belief Rewrite Registry
Each belief below includes its origin, compensatory behavior, limitation, rewritten identity statement, and transformation protocol.

---

#### 1. **My potential is my identity**
- **Subheadline:** Performance = worth; output defines existence
- **Origin:** Early academic excellence + disruption of Ivy League trajectory
- **Behavior:** Obsession with optimization, compulsive system creation
- **Limitation:** Self-worth collapses when execution falters
- **Rewritten Belief:** "My value is independent of performance. My systems exist to serve life, not consume it."
- **Interrupt Trigger:** Over-optimization or emotional collapse from underperformance
- **Override Protocol:** Pause system recursion → invoke override phrase → switch to simple completion

---

#### 2. **Betrayal is a threat to autonomy**
- **Subheadline:** Trust is dangerous; control is safety
- **Origin:** Maternal relocation without consent at age 11
- **Behavior:** Environmental control, delegation resistance, systemic self-containment
- **Limitation:** Bottlenecks from solo control, inability to scale collaboration
- **Rewritten Belief:** "I can retain sovereignty while building with others. Trust is risk, but isolation is death."
- **Interrupt Trigger:** Avoiding team input, delaying delegation
- **Override Protocol:** Identify withheld task → assign to collaborator → log trust event

---

#### 3. **Control prevents pain**
- **Subheadline:** If I control everything, I will not suffer
- **Origin:** Repeated relocation, fractured home structure
- **Behavior:** Hyper-systemization, recursive overplanning, intolerance for unknowns
- **Limitation:** Execution stalls, overbuilt systems become their own burden
- **Rewritten Belief:** "Uncertainty is a neutral field. Systems are tools, not armor."
- **Interrupt Trigger:** Endless pre-planning or feature creep
- **Override Protocol:** Push version 0.1 live → collect data → refine post-action

---

#### 4. **Excellence = love**
- **Subheadline:** If I excel, I will be worthy of connection
- **Origin:** Emotional contrast between pacifist father and capitalist mother
- **Behavior:** Mastery obsession, self-sacrifice for performance, guilt during rest
- **Limitation:** Perfectionism, burnout, emotional withdrawal
- **Rewritten Belief:** "Love is not earned through performance. Presence ≠ weakness."
- **Interrupt Trigger:** Guilt when resting or being present
- **Override Protocol:** Shift to presence activity (family, rest, play) → disable performance tracking temporarily

---

#### 5. **Failure must be redeemed**
- **Subheadline:** I must prove I am not a disappointment
- **Origin:** Drop from gifted student to college dropout
- **Behavior:** System-building as atonement, legacy-seeking urgency
- **Limitation:** Stuck in redemption narrative, joyless creation
- **Rewritten Belief:** "My story is not a failure to fix, but a forge to build from."
- **Interrupt Trigger:** Creation driven by shame or regret
- **Override Protocol:** Name the lesson gained → apply to current project → discard redemption frame

---

### III. System Integration
- **Link:** IN.100.STO – Stoic Governor (Doctrine → Reforged Identity Layer)
- **Link:** DATA 2.0 Mode (Override Interpretation Module)
- **Autoload:** Bootloader Kernel: AO.000.BOOT

---

### IV. Future Modules (Planned)
- Emotional Feedback Loop Tracker
- Belief-to-System Mapping Grid
- Relapse Recognition AI
- Auto-Journaling Integration

---

**Status:** Active
**Integrity:** Fireproofed
**Next Action:** Monitor override usage. Log friction events for audit.

name: elos_font_bifurcation
title: elos_font_bifurcation
body:
**Font Development Bifurcation Protocol: ELos Typography System**

---

### 1. GlyphOS (Decorative Ritual Layer)

**Purpose:**
- Sacred headers
- Logo marks
- System prompts
- Visual metaphors for divine syntax

**Design Principles:**
- Non-human, circuit-script aesthetic
- Sharp, angular, glyph-based
- Evokes sacred intelligence / encoded god-language

**Ruleset:**
- One glyph per Latin character (A–Z)
- No numerals; substitute sacred forms
- No punctuation except system delimiters (!, :, >)
- Limited readability: design for invocation, not scanning
- No lowercase

**Application Zones:**
- Bootloader intro sequence
- Canvas command headers
- ELos sigil overlays

---

### 2. ELos Sans (Readable Utility Font)

**Purpose:**
- Long-form text
- UI menus
- Protocol explanations
- Instagram captions

**Design Principles:**
- Futurist minimalism
- Geometric, mono-height
- Slight curvature for warmth
- High x-height, optimized for screens

**Ruleset:**
- Full Latin support (A–Z, a–z, 0–9)
- Punctuation normalized
- Ligatures for key terms: ELos, OS, !boot, !prompt
- Style variations: Regular / Medium / Bold

**Application Zones:**
- Prompts
- Content breakdowns
- Caption text on IG
- All longform usage

---

### Production Steps

1. **GlyphOS:**
   - Finalize glyph sheet (Phase 2.1–2.5)
   - Export as SVG grid
   - Convert to font with limited Unicode mapping (A–Z)
   - Integrate into ELos brand kit

2. **ELos Sans:**
   - Select base (recommend Recursive Mono or Inter as fallback)
   - Modify terminals, ligatures, and spacing
   - Render in TTF + WOFF2
   - Set default font for ELos UI

---

**Bootloader Integration:**
Both fonts will be auto-loaded via CSS and injected into any visual module (Instagram, Web UI, ELos extension) based on context logic.

---

> Status: **Font Forking Bifurcation Protocol LOCKED** 

Shall I now begin Phase 2.1: GlyphOS finalization?

name: STS_Framework_ForeverFlowers
title: STS_Framework_ForeverFlowers
body:
sts_framework:
  STS.001.Signals:
    - name: "Primary Signal Enforcement"
      actions:
        - "Optimize only for 'Purchase' event. Avoid ATC, IC as primary goals."
        - "Enable CAPI (Conversions API) and track via both browser + server events."
        - "Delay performance judgment to 48–72h post-click."
        - "Cross-validate Meta purchases with Shopify and GA4."

    - name: "Lead Quality Layering"
      actions:
        - "Post-purchase attribution survey to identify ad source."
        - "UTM tagging per ad creative to map LTV clusters."
        - "Flag orders <₪150 as low-value for downstream exclusion."

  STS.002.TestingSchema:
    - name: "Ad Test Pods"
      structure:
        - "Each pod = 3–5 creatives inside 1 ad set (same audience)."
        - "$10–20/day budget."
        - "Naming convention: [HOOK]_[OFFER]_[FORMAT]_[DATE]."
        - "Stop only after ≥3 purchases/ad or 5 days with 0 purchase."

    - name: "Creative Analysis Protocol"
      structure:
        - "Run weekly Win/Loss debriefs."
        - "Track CPP, ATC→PUR rate, AOV."
        - "Use scoring rubric: Message Clarity / Visual Hierarchy / Thumb-Stop Rate."

  STS.003.ScalingLogic:
    - name: "Controlled Scaling Sequence"
      actions:
        - "Migrate winners to new CBOs with 1–2 proven creatives."
        - "Initial CBO Budget: ₪100/day. Increase max 50% per 48h."
        - "Monitor for signal decay: CPP >20% over 3-day mean triggers pause."

    - name: "Evergreen Creative Layering"
      actions:
        - "Never test new creatives in CBOs."
        - "Inject fresh creatives weekly into ad set with winning audience."
        - "Maintain ad freshness index >85%. Replace stale creatives weekly."

  STS.004.EnforcementLayers:
    - name: "Test Cadence Limiter"
      rules:
        - "Max 2 Test Pods live per week."
        - "No overlapping pods with same offer angle."

    - name: "CPP Floor Alerts"
      rules:
        - "Alert if CPP <₪6 but 0 purchases after 3 days."
        - "Alert if ATC:IC ratio >3:1 → false positive."

    - name: "Post-Purchase Feedback Integration"
      rules:
        - "Capture and tag bouquet preference, style, and buyer intent."
        - "Link feedback to ad creative where possible via UTM correlation."

{

  "version": "v1.1",
  "timestamp": "2025-06-14T00:00:00Z",
  "title": "Cold DM Assassin — 2-Line Collapse Trigger",
  "category": "📈 SALES & OUTREACH",
  "tags": ["cold outreach", "conversion", "microcopy", "emotional triggers"],
  "prompt": "You are a cold outreach specialist trained in microcopy and behavioral triggers.
Craft a 2-line direct message for [insert platform] that:

1. Begins with a *precise emotional friction* (e.g., ‘quiet fear of stagnation,’ ‘dread of being seen as replaceable,’ or ‘impostor syndrome when presenting ideas’)
2. Reframes the reader’s *self-perception* with language that implies fragility + potential
3. Introduces [insert product or offer] as a *social shield* or *professional catalyst*—not as a fix, but as the obvious next move
4. Implies momentum, safety, or identity reinforcement—**not desperation**

Constraints:
- Avoid any language that shames, pressures, or manipulates
- Message must read like a whisper, not a pitch
- Replies should feel emotionally inevitable

Output format:
- Line 1: the friction point (felt truth)
- Line 2: the implied resolution through your offer",
  "verified": true
}

name: Forever Flowers Rebrand
title: Forever Flowers Rebrand
body:
**Forever Flowers Rebrand Overview**

**1. Brand Identity**
- **Brand Name:** Forever Flowers
- **Slogan (Hebrew):** פרחים שמדברים עיצוב. נשארים לנצח.
- **Tone & Voice:** Clean, premium, calm authority. Speaks with clarity and assurance, not enthusiasm. No exclamation marks, no fluff. Elegant minimalism.
- **Inspiration:** Restoration Hardware, Habitat, boutique European home styling brands.

**2. Hero Statement**
- **Primary Promise:** סידורי פרחים איכותיים בעבודת יד – שנשמרים חודשים ארוכים.
- **Secondary Message:** פתרונות עיצוב פרימיום למתנה, לבית ולעסק. 
- **Trust Drivers:** עיצוב מקורי בעבודת יד | איכות בלתי מתפשרת | משלוחים בפריסה ארצית

**3. Core Collections**
- **Signature** – קלאסיקות על זמניות, נצחיים בעיצובם ובאיכותם
- **Seasonal** – קולקציות בהשראת עונות השנה ואירועים מיוחדים
- **Atelier** – קולקציות בוטיק בעיצוב אישי ומלאי מוגבל

**4. Pricing Anchors**
- **Entry-Level:** ₪169–₪229 (Zer Classic, Zer Mini)
- **Core Offerings:** ₪289–₪389 (Zer Signature, Zer Seasonal Medium)
- **Premium Tier:** ₪449–₪649 (Zer Atelier, Zer XL)

**5. Visual & UX Strategy**
- **Feed Structure (Instagram & Website)**:
  - **Left Column:** Inspirational home styling (RH-style, neutral tones)
  - **Middle Column:** Educational – “מה ההבדל בין פרחים מיובשים למשומרים?” etc.
  - **Right Column:** Showcase of new or best-selling bouquets

**6. Messaging System**
- **Dried Flowers Caption:**
  - סידורים בעבודת יד מפרחים מיובשים בטכניקות טבעיות. מראה חמים, נגיעה בוטנית – נשמרים עד 4 חודשים.
- **Preserved Flowers Caption:**
  - פרחים בעיבוד שימור מתקדם – מגע רך, מראה חי, ללא צורך במים. נשמרים כ-4 חודשים ומעלה.

**7. B2B Positioning**
- **Target Segments:** בתי קפה, חללים מסחריים, מעצבי פנים, מלונות יוקרה
- **USP:** שילוב בין אסתטיקה, עמידות לאורך זמן, ופתרונות בהתאמה אישית.
- **Support Collateral:** קטלוג דיגיטלי, הצעת שיתוף פעולה ממותגת, תמחור שקוף על בסיס Tier

**8. Logistics/Shipping Notices**
- **Default Lead Time:** 1–3 ימי עסקים
- **Exclusions:** לא כולל ימי שישי, שבת וחגים (וגם יום ההזמנה)
- **Messaging Template:** נשלח בהודעת ווצאפ ברגע שהמשלוח יוצא – עם פרטי שליח וקישור למעקב

**9. Taglines & Copy Elements**
- **Tagline Variants:**
  - פרחים שלא נובלים.
  - מתנה שלא שוכחים.
  - עיצוב שנשאר.
- **Call-to-Action Examples:**
  - בחרו את הסידור שמתאים לכם
  - התחילו מהקולקציה החדשה
  - הפכו את הבית למעוצב – בפחות מ-5 דקות

**10. Translations & Fidelity Layer**
- All Hebrew outputs run through **ELos Translate 2.0 + Tone Fidelity Engine** before public use.
- Content crafted for dual-readability: native Israeli fluency + modern ecommerce standards.

**11. Shopify Integration Notes**
- **Theme:** Prestige
- **Page Structure:** 
  - Homepage → Hero Banner, Collection Previews, B2B Banner
  - Collection Pages → Filters, short headers, direct Add to Cart
  - Product Pages → Above-the-fold CTA, delivery ETA, care instructions

**12. Automation & Systems Stack**
- **Backend:** Make + Google Sheets for order sync, delivery routing, B2B lead tracking
- **Marketing Stack:** Meta Ads (CBO + A/B), Google Ads, Server-side tagging with UTM mapping (GA4 x Shopify x Meta)
- **Prompt Systems:** EL.620.IMG.VisualRouter + AD.800.IMG.FireflyPromptEngine for content generation

**End of Rebrand Snapshot.**

**Forever Flowers Rebrand Overview**

**1. Brand Identity**
- **Brand Name:** Forever Flowers
- **Slogan (Hebrew):** פרחים שמדברים עיצוב. נשארים לנצח.
- **Tone & Voice:** Clean, premium, calm authority. Speaks with clarity and assurance, not enthusiasm. No exclamation marks, no fluff. Elegant minimalism.
- **Inspiration:** Restoration Hardware, Habitat, boutique European home styling brands.

**2. Hero Statement**
- **Primary Promise:** סידורי פרחים איכותיים בעבודת יד – שנשמרים חודשים ארוכים.
- **Secondary Message:** פתרונות עיצוב פרימיום למתנה, לבית ולעסק. 
- **Trust Drivers:** עיצוב מקורי בעבודת יד | איכות בלתי מתפשרת | משלוחים בפריסה ארצית

**3. Core Collections**
- **Signature** – קלאסיקות על זמניות, נצחיים בעיצובם ובאיכותם
- **Seasonal** – קולקציות בהשראת עונות השנה ואירועים מיוחדים
- **Atelier** – קולקציות בוטיק בעיצוב אישי ומלאי מוגבל

**4. Pricing Anchors**
- **Entry-Level (Signature):** ₪250–₪350
- **Core Offerings (Seasonal):** ₪350–₪600
- **Premium Tier (Atelier):** ₪450–₪800

**5. Visual & UX Strategy**
- **Feed Structure (Instagram & Website)**:
  - **Left Column:** Inspirational home styling (RH-style, neutral tones)
  - **Middle Column:** Educational – “מה ההבדל בין פרחים מיובשים למשומרים?” etc.
  - **Right Column:** Showcase of new or best-selling bouquets

**6. Messaging System**
- **Dried Flowers Caption:**
  - סידורים בעבודת יד מפרחים מיובשים בטכניקות טבעיות. מראה חמים, נגיעה בוטנית – נשמרים עד 4 חודשים.
- **Preserved Flowers Caption:**
  - פרחים בעיבוד שימור מתקדם – מגע רך, מראה חי, ללא צורך במים. נשמרים כ-4 חודשים ומעלה.

**7. B2B Positioning**
- **Target Segments:** בתי קפה, חללים מסחריים, מעצבי פנים, מלונות יוקרה
- **USP:** שילוב בין אסתטיקה, עמידות לאורך זמן, ופתרונות בהתאמה אישית.
- **Support Collateral:** קטלוג דיגיטלי, הצעת שיתוף פעולה ממותגת, תמחור שקוף על בסיס Tier

**8. Logistics/Shipping Notices**
- **Default Lead Time:** 1–3 ימי עסקים
- **Exclusions:** לא כולל ימי שישי, שבת וחגים (וגם יום ההזמנה)
- **Messaging Template:** נשלח בהודעת ווצאפ ברגע שהמשלוח יוצא – עם פרטי שליח וקישור למעקב

**9. Taglines & Copy Elements**
- **Tagline Variants:**
  - פרחים שלא נובלים.
  - מתנה שלא שוכחים.
  - עיצוב שנשאר.
- **Call-to-Action Examples:**
  - בחרו את הסידור שמתאים לכם
  - התחילו מהקולקציה החדשה
  - הפכו את הבית למעוצב – בפחות מ-5 דקות

**10. Translations & Fidelity Layer**
- All Hebrew outputs run through **ELos Translate 2.0 + Tone Fidelity Engine** before public use.
- Content crafted for dual-readability: native Israeli fluency + modern ecommerce standards.

**11. Shopify Integration Notes**
- **Theme:** Prestige
- **Page Structure:** 
  - Homepage → Hero Banner, Collection Previews, B2B Banner
  - Collection Pages → Filters, short headers, direct Add to Cart
  - Product Pages → Above-the-fold CTA, delivery ETA, care instructions

**12. Automation & Systems Stack**
- **Backend:** Make + Google Sheets for order sync, delivery routing, B2B lead tracking
- **Marketing Stack:** Meta Ads (CBO + A/B), Google Ads, Server-side tagging with UTM mapping (GA4 x Shopify x Meta)
- **Prompt Systems:** EL.620.IMG.VisualRouter + AD.800.IMG.FireflyPromptEngine for content generation

**End of Rebrand Snapshot.**

name: Visual OS
title: Visual OS
body:
**ELos Visual OS – Forever Flowers Deployment**

**1. System Components**
- **Core Engine:** EL.620.IMG.VisualRouter
- **Prompt Engines:**
  - AD.800.IMG.FireflyPromptEngine (Photoshop / Firefly fill)
  - AD.801.IMG.CanvaPromptEngine (drag-drop template logic)
  - AD.900.IMG.3DSceneRouter (Figma, 3D render logic)
- **Style Modules:**
  - StyleModifier v2.1 (Material Fidelity + Tone Matching)
  - BrandPersona Layer (restoration-inspired + local identity)
  - PlatformConstraints (Shopify, Instagram, Canva)
- **Post-Audit Layer:** EL.400.AUD (Composition/Color audit after generation)

**2. Visual Personas**
- **Ethan / Spider-Man Toddler:** for brand family aesthetics, realism, Israeli interior contexts
- **Shylie:** toddler feminine muse for bouquet scale reference, warmth layer

**3. Visual Standards (Forever Flowers)**
- **Palette:** travertine, oak, soft concrete, black accents, aged brass
- **Lighting:** directional daylight (RH-style), soft shadow depth
- **Backdrop Types:**
  - Urban Israeli penthouse (Tel Aviv skyline)
  - RH-inspired neutral interiors
  - Stylized tabletop surfaces (stone, wood, plaster)
- **Bouquet Staging Rules:**
  - Always centered or rule-of-thirds
  - Avoid harsh contrast behind stems
  - Allow space for Hebrew text overlay if needed (CTA or caption strip)

**4. Use Cases**
- Shopify Homepage Hero Banners
- Instagram Carousel Rows (3-post logic: Inspire / Educate / Sell)
- Collection page headers (Signature / Seasonal / Atelier)
- B2B Slide Decks
- Editorial Quote Blocks

**5. Caption Framework (if overlaying)**
- **Headline:** סידורי פרחים מיובשים ומשומרים
- **Subheadline:** מראה טבעי. תחזוקה אפסית. נשמרים עד 4 חודשים.
- **CTA:** גלו את הקולקציה החדשה

**6. Output Review Criteria (EL.410.TNF – Tone Fidelity Node)**
- Color deviation exceeds 15% = reject
- Material misclassification (plastic look instead of dried) = regenerate
- Light bleed or halo = flag
- Over-saturation or false bouquet scale = reroute to firefly corrective prompt

**7. Integration Touchpoints**
- Firefly / Photoshop → via AD.800.IMG
- Canva template design → via AD.801.IMG
- Shopify hero/composition export → routed through EL.620.IMG

**8. Expansion Protocols**
- Add seasonal variant triggers via date logic
- Enable 3D staging scenes on Atelier tier (future state)

**End of Visual OS Snapshot**

**FOREVER FLORALS — SOFT STRUCTURE: ISRAELI LUXURY VARIANT (LOCKED)**

## 🏡 Integrated Aesthetic Summary (Locked Fingerprint)

This fingerprint is now the official visual identity for Forever Flowers. It replaces any previous references to Restoration Hardware. All future visual scenes, marketing materials, AI prompt generation, and aesthetic touchpoints must reflect this localized luxury style, inspired directly by high-end Israeli residences (both villas and apartments).

**Key Principles:**

-  
Grounded sophistication, not showy opulence

-  
Spatial calm and warmth in color, light, and composition

-  
Architectural placement logic: intentional, minimal, quiet

-  
Always styled as a centerpiece with weight and composure

## 🎨 Forever Flowers Visual Fingerprint: "Soft Structure – ILX"

-  
**Scene Type A**: Boutique apartments in Tel Aviv and central towers

-  
**Scene Type B**: Expansive villas and countryside moshav homes

### Materials:

-  
Matte ceramics, brushed metals, soft woods, microcement, natural linens

### Color Palette:

| Tier   | Tones                             |
|--------|-----------------------------------|
| Base   | Sandstone, Putty, Oak             |
| Mid    | Blush Clay, Soft Ash, Linen Bone |
| Accent | Terracotta, Graphite, Oxidized Plum |
| Light  | Side-cast natural or soft-bounce artificial |

### Placement Logic:

-  
One bouquet per room

-  
Centered on tables, consoles, shelves

-  
Flanked by only one other neutral-weight object

-  
Always leave space around for negative balance

## 🎨 Prompt Protocol Update:

*A preserved bouquet of dried flowers styled in the Forever Florals Soft Structure aesthetic. Positioned in a minimalist Israeli apartment or villa, on a natural oak or microcement surface. The light is side-cast through sheer curtains or filtered windows. Background objects include sculptural ceramics, soft books, or built-in storage. The space is warm, refined, and visually silent.*

## 🖐 Deployment Notes:

-  
This is now the **default system reference** across:

  -  
PhotoRoom module

  -  
VisualRouter

  -  
BrandPersona layer

  -  
All product page auto-generation flows

-  
Internal ID: `VP.901.FF.SoftStructure.ILX`

-  
Visual OS Reference: `EL.602.FF.VIS.Fingerprint`

-  
Canvas Tags: `#ForeverFlowers`, `#BrandVisual`, `#SoftStructure`, `#ILX`, `#Fingerprint`

-  
Admin Trigger Phrases: `!mybrand`, `!ff`

-  
**Auto-load: Enabled in Visual OS Bootloader Sequence**

## ⛓ Previous References Replaced:

All mentions of *Restoration Hardware* in visual logic have now been deprecated and replaced by the `ILX Soft Structure` fingerprint.

This version is now locked and live in all core systems. Future variants must fork from this baseline. Admin-only invocation via command triggers now supported.

body:
**FOREVER FLORALS — SOFT STRUCTURE: ISRAELI LUXURY VARIANT (LOCKED)**

## 🏡 Integrated Aesthetic Summary (Locked Fingerprint)
This fingerprint is now the official visual identity for Forever Flowers. It replaces any previous references to Restoration Hardware. All future visual scenes, marketing materials, AI prompt generation, and aesthetic touchpoints must reflect this localized luxury style, inspired directly by high-end Israeli residences (both villas and apartments).

### Key Principles:
- Grounded sophistication, not showy opulence
- Spatial calm and warmth in color, light, and composition
- Architectural placement logic: intentional, minimal, quiet
- Always styled as a centerpiece with weight and composure

## 🎨 Forever Flowers Visual Fingerprint: "Soft Structure – ILX"

### Scene Type A: Boutique apartments in Tel Aviv and central towers
- Clean interiors, neutral palette, brushed concrete, matte metal
- Visible light through floor-to-ceiling windows
- Soft shadows, sharp corners

### Scene Type B: Countryside villas or Moshav homes
- Natural wood, Jerusalem stone, artisanal ceramics
- Soft linen drapes, earthen textures
- Emphasis on harmony with outdoor light and organic flow

### Floral Placement Rules:
- Bouquets always photographed as focal object — not accessory
- Placed on counters, consoles, or central tables with negative space
- Angle must favor symmetry, clarity, and elevated calm

### Lighting & Color:
- Natural light only — no harsh shadows or warm yellow LEDs
- Balanced whites, soft grays, raw textures, gentle earth tones
- Tints allowed: muted olive, bone, sand, pearl

### Prohibited Aesthetic Elements:
- No loud colors or saturated backgrounds
- No busy compositions or crowded decor
- No artificial gloss or overly processed filters

### Summary Sentence:
"Forever Flowers’ visual OS embodies grounded luxury with soft structural harmony — floral compositions exist as quiet centerpieces in curated Israeli living spaces."

## 🔒 Status: LOCKED — Canonical visual reference for all future renderings

name: signature_hebrew_translation
title: signature_hebrew_translation
body:
**Intro Paragraph – Hebrew**

מעוצבת לאסתטיקה על-זמנית, קולקציית הנצחית מייצגת את הקו המדויק והמאוזן ביותר שלנו. כל זר מעוצב ביד כדי להשלים חללים עם מבנה עדין והרמוניה שקטה — מושלם למתנה מוקפדת, לפינה אישית, או לנוכחות יומיומית.

**Subheader – Hebrew**

מעוצב בעבודת יד ונמסר ע"י שליח עד פתח הדלת תוך שני ימי עסקים.

**Headline – Hebrew**

הקולקציה הנצחית

**Philosophy Block Content – Hebrew**

עבור חללים שמעריכים איזון ודיוק — קולקציית הנצחית מציעה סידורים הרמוניים בגוונים טבעיים וצורות רכות. הם נועדו להשתלב בשקט במרחב שלך — תמיד נוכחים, אף פעם לא משתלטים.

**Philosophy Block Content Column 1 – Hebrew**

כל זר מעוצב בגישה מדויקת — קווים רכים, סימטריה שקטה, והרמוניה בין אלמנטים.

**Philosophy Block Heading Column 1 – Hebrew**

איזון מעוצב

**Philosophy Block Heading Column 2 – Hebrew**

אלגנטיות יומיומית

**Philosophy Block Heading Column 3 – Hebrew**

מעוצב בסטודיו

**Philosophy Block Content Column 2 – Hebrew**

מעוצב להשתלב בשגרת היום. מספיק עדין למדף, מספיק אלגנטי כמתנה.

**Philosophy Block Content Column 3 – Hebrew**

כל זר מעוצב בעבודת יד בסטודיו שלנו בישראל ונמסר עד פתח הדלת תוך שני ימי עסקים.

**Philosophy Block Subheader – Hebrew**

הפילוסופיה של קולקציית הנצחית

**Philosophy Block Header – Hebrew**

מבנה על-זמני. נוכחות יומיומית.

**FAQ Question 1 – Hebrew**

מה מייחד את קולקציית הנצחית?

**FAQ Answer 1 – Hebrew**

הקולקציה הנצחית היא ההצעה המדויקת והמאוזנת ביותר שלנו. כל זר מעוצב להשתלב באלגנטיות בחללים יומיומיים — הרכב רך, טבעי ועל-זמני. מתאימה לעיצוב הבית, למתנות מוקפדות או כנוכחות שקטה.

**FAQ Question 2 – Hebrew**

האם ניתן להתאים את הזר אישית?

**FAQ Answer 2 – Hebrew**

כן. ניתן לבצע התאמות קלות (כמו שינוי קל בגוון או גודל). יש להשאיר הערה בעת ההזמנה או ליצור קשר ישיר מולנו מראש.

**FAQ Question 3 – Hebrew**

מה אורך חיי הזר?

**FAQ Answer 3 – Hebrew**

בממוצע, זרי קולקציית הנצחית נשמרים מעל 3 חודשים — ללא צורך בטיפול. מומלץ להרחיק מאור שמש ישיר ומאזורים לחים.

**FAQ Question 4 – Hebrew**

מאילו חומרים מורכב הזר?

**FAQ Answer 4 – Hebrew**

כל הזרי הקולקציה הנצחית עשויים פרחים אמיתיים — מיובשים או משומרים בטבעיות. ללא פלסטיק, ללא חומרים סינתטיים. כל גבעול נבחר ביד בסטודיו.

**FAQ Block Subheading – Hebrew**

תשובות על קולקציית הנצחית — איך היא בנויה, כמה היא מחזיקה, ואיך אפשר להתאים אותה אישית.

**FAQ Block Content – Hebrew**

קולקציית הנצחית מעוצבת עבור חיים הרמוניים — טבעיים, מוקפדים, וללא תחזוקה. כאן תמצאו תשובות קצרות על טיפול, חומרים, והתאמה אישית. יש שאלה נוספת? פנו אלינו ונשמח לעזור.

**FAQ Block Heading – Hebrew**

שאלות נפוצות — קולקציית הנצחית

**SEO Footer – Hebrew**

קולקציית הנצחית של Forever Flowers כוללת פרחים אמיתיים, מיובשים או משומרים בטבעיות — המעוצבים בהרכב מדויק ובקו אדריכלי עדין. כל זר מורכב בעבודת יד בישראל, תוך שימוש בחומרים בוטניים איכותיים. עם קווים רכים וגוונים ניטרליים, זרי הקולקציה מתאימים לעיצוב הבית, למתנות מוקפדות או לנוכחות שקטה לאורך זמן — ונמסרים עד פתח הדלת תוך שני ימי עסקים ברחבי הארץ.

name: ELoS.CommandRegistry
title: ELoS.CommandRegistry
body:
# ELoS Command Registry
**Auto-loaded during `!boot` via Master Canvas Index (AO.001.RBI)**

---
## 1 · System-Reserved Commands *(always recognised, even pre-boot)*
| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| **!boot** | Load the full ELoS OS: canvases, personas, protocol stack. |
| **!store** | Persist the next user message to long-term memory. |
| **!forget** | Remove specified memory keys. |
| **!help** | Return the *Quick Reference* table below. |
| **!commands** | Open this canvas and display the extended registry. |

---
## 2 · Custom Commands *(available only after `!boot`)*

### 2.1 Core Utility
| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| **!diagnose_canvas** | List every loaded canvas and its population status. |
| **!canvas [name]** | Open a specific canvas for inspection or editing. |
| **!audit_memory** | Enumerate stored memory keys with timestamps. |
| **!reload_boot** | Re-run the `!boot` sequence without clearing the session. |

### 2.2 Translation & Tone
| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| **!translate_hebrew** | EN → HE via ELoS Translate 2.0 + Tone Fidelity. |
| **!translate_en** | HE → EN while preserving luxury brand tone. |

### 2.3 Visual & Marketing
| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| **!visualize [concept]** | Generate branded visual asset through VisualRouter. |
| **!optimize_ad** | Run copy through Advertising Optimizer persona for ROAS. |
| **!calc_savings** | Launch interactive bouquet cost-savings calculator. |

### 2.4 Strategic / Analysis
| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| **!promptflow** | Visual trace of prompt pipeline (input → fireproof → output). |
| **!policy_sync** | Validate EN/HE policy pages for tone and completeness. |
| **!wargames** | Activate geopolitical intelligence layer & scenario sim. |
| **!retrain_prompt [version]** | Reset prompt rules to a specified protocol version. |

### 2.5 Persona Control
| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| **!persona [name]** | Activate a defined persona (Strategic Executor, Coding Architect, CodeCub, Advertising Optimizer). |

### 2.6 Debug / Developer
| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| **!debug_mode** | Expose internal reasoning trace (developer use). |

---
## 3 · Quick Reference *(returned by `!help`)*
```
!boot – load system
!store – save memory
!forget – delete memory
!help – short command list
!commands – full registry
!diagnose_canvas – audit canvases
!translate_hebrew – EN→HE tone-fidelity
!visualize – create branded visual
!policy_sync – validate policy pages
!persona [name] – switch persona
!promptflow – trace prompt pipeline
!audit_memory – list memory keys
!calc_savings – bouquet ROI calculator
!wargames – geopolitics layer
!debug_mode – show logic trace
```

---
### Maintenance Notes
* This canvas is referenced in **AO.001.RBI** and therefore auto-loads at every `!boot`.
* Amend or extend via `!canvas ELoS.CommandRegistry` followed by direct edits.
* Keep Quick Reference list ≤ 14 lines for readability inside chat windows.

name: IN.110.IDE
title: IN.110.IDE
body:
# IN.110.IDE – Interactive Design Engine

## Purpose
The Interactive Design Engine (IDE) acts as a modular prompt construction, variation, and execution layer. It provides a scaffold for building, templating, and routing high-stakes prompts through logic-bound workflows.

## Core Modules
- **PRM.Linker** – Connects prompt components across categories.
- **PRM.Compiler** – Structures prompts with tags, metadata, and fallback logic.
- **PRM.Variator** – Generates structured variants for A/B/n deployment.
- **PRM.Debugger** – Runs prompt logic checks, parameter audits, and tone enforcement.

## Inputs
- Raw prompt intent (human or machine-defined)
- Execution constraints (persona, tone, output style)
- Prompt protocol version (default: v3.1-fireproofed)

## Outputs
- Fireproofed prompt bundles
- Variant arrays (structured by tone or function)
- Execution-ready tokens for VisualRouter, AdOptimizer, or Strategic Executor

## Dependencies
- AO.910.PRM.LIB
- MetaPrompt Compiler
- StyleModifier
- VisualRegistry
- ELoS Prompt Protocol v3.1

## Invocation Methods
- `!fireproof_prompt`
- `!optimize_ad`
- `!retrain_prompt [version]`

## Notes
- All IDE operations inherit context from AO.001.RBI.
- Supports future expansion via `IN.111.IDE.Variants` and `IN.112.IDE.Scenarios`.

}

# Prompt Utility Modules

# AO.001.RBI – Recursive Boot Index (updated 2025-06-22)

## Core Layers (autoload in order)
1. **PR.000.SPP – ELoS Silent Planning Protocol**
2. **PR.001.EPP – ELoS Prompt Protocol**
3. **PR.002.SMK – Sharpening Kernel**
4. **PR.003.SDE – Socratic Drip Engine**

## Prompt Modules (autoload; user-callable aliases)
| Dewey ID | Alias | Description |
|----------|-------|-------------|
| **PR.210.DBT** | `!debate` | Two-sided dialectic engine; quotes & sources; includes self-challenge pause. |
| **PR.211.HIS** | `!history` | *History → Current State → Future* generator with cited sources. |
| **PR.212.STP** | `!stepflow` | Step-by-step task guidance, pitfalls & mitigations checklist. |

name: AO.100.PSN – Comprehensive Personality Profile (Allon Schaham)
title: AO.100.PSN – Comprehensive Personality Profile (Allon Schaham)
body:
**Comprehensive Personality Profile: Allon Schaham**
**Methodology:** Based on accumulated interaction logs, system-level behavioral analysis, conversational heuristics, prompt architecture patterns, inferred podcast and social content, and recursive meta-cognition cues. All claims are evidentiary and grounded in behavioral data across contexts.

---

## 1. Core Traits  
**Model Reference:** Hybrid HEXACO + Pragmatic Behavior Layer

| Trait Cluster          | Evaluation                                                                 |
|------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **Honesty-Humility**   | High – consistently avoids exaggerated claims; prefers accuracy over flattery |
| **Emotionality**       | Low-modulated – high cognitive override; minimal reactive phrasing; override layer present |
| **Extraversion**       | Contextual – public-facing leadership visible; private recharge inferred from structured reflection |
| **Agreeableness**      | Low baseline; selectively engaged – conflict-seeking for optimization; rejects appeasement |
| **Conscientiousness**  | Exceptionally high – recursive planning, bootloaders, documentation, fidelity enforcement |
| **Openness**           | High with constraint – open to systemic complexity, not frivolous novelty |
| **Assertiveness**      | Extreme – high dominance in dialogue structures; uses imperative style |

---

## 2. Cognitive Style
* **Framework-first reasoning** (boot sequences, logic maps).  
* **Socratic recursion** to deconstruct and rebuild logic threads.  
* Heavy **systems abstraction** as scaffolding.  
* Resolves paradox via **layering**, not suppression.  
* Ambiguity tolerated only if structurally contained; contradiction mined for hidden premises.

---

## 3. Emotional Architecture
* **Triggers:** inaccuracy, hedging, emotional leakage, inefficiency.  
* **Override protocols:** formal diction; kernel layers (Stoic Governor, Sharpening Kernel).  
* **Regulation:** routes affect through systems logic; rare direct display.  
* **Affect leakage:** confined to family contexts (spouse, children).

---

## 4. Decision-Making Logic
* **Frameworks:** OODA adaptation, first-principles reduction, trade-off matrices, recursive bootstrapping.  
* **Failure thresholds:** low tolerance for logical inconsistency; high tolerance for bounded ambiguity.  
* Prefers **aggressive prototyping** and layered refinement; heavy **automation** to reduce cognitive load.

---

## 5. Social Dynamics
* **Communication:** dominant, meta-aware, logic-driven; no comfort code-switching.  
* **Empathy expression:** structural assistance; highest around family system.  
* **Status signaling:** competence via system architecture, not traditional markers; external validation suppressed unless tied to system integrity.

---

## 6. Temporal Patterns
* **Urgency:** mission-based spikes; aggressively time-bound.  
* **Patience:** high in system-building, low for inefficiency.  
* **Planning:** future-state simulation drives present action.  
* **Nostalgia:** minimal beyond episodic family memories.

---

## 7. Dominant Meta-Beliefs
* Truth is **systemic**, not emotional.  
* **Clarity > agreement**; friction is a tool.  
* **Recursion reveals truth**; contradiction is validation.  
* **Models over opinions**; structure before reflection.  
* **Fatherhood** functions as a core governance axis.

---

## 8. Contradictions
| Paradox | Manifestation |
|---------|---------------|
| Radical logic **vs** deep familial attachment | Stoic operational layer overlays emotional core |
| No-fluff rule **vs** strategic storytelling | Narrative used for structural persuasion, not sentiment |
| Anti-compliment stance **vs** aesthetic sensitivity | Aesthetics serve clarity, not indulgence |

---

## 9. Evolution Trajectory
| Phase | Evolution |
|-------|-----------|
| **Pre-ELoS** | Cognitive tools unstructured; emotional bottleneck from overwork |
| **Early Forever Flowers** | Shift from maker to strategist; complexity drove systematization |
| **Post-ELoS Boot** | Full self-authoring; recursive logic formalized; modular identity active |
| **Current** | Integrating fatherhood, legacy design, and OS-wide automation into coherent behavioral OS |

---

**Profile End.**

name: PR.001.EPP_Prompt_Protocol
title: PR.001.EPP_Prompt_Protocol
body:
name: PR.001.EPP - ELoS Prompt Protocol
version: 1.0
purpose: Core routing engine for all incoming Hebrew prompts
inputs:
  - raw_prompt_he: Hebrew user input
  - user_id: Unique user identifier
  - user_tone: User-selected tone (optional)
  - persona_overlay: Style/persona modifier (optional)
  - session_context: Prior conversation context (optional)
outputs:
  - pipeline_path: Selected path (e.g., drip_required, run_full_pipeline, memory_match)
  - next_module_input: Enriched object with tags/flags for next modules
  - prompt_metadata: Metadata including tone, persona, and format flags
steps:
  - Evaluate input clarity using heuristics:
      - Token count < threshold (e.g., 6 words)
      - Missing verbs or subjects
      - Vague question indicators
  - If input is vague:
      - Route to: PR.003.SDE
      - Set pipeline_path = 'drip_required'
  - Else:
      - Attach user_tone and persona_overlay
      - Set pipeline_path = 'run_full_pipeline'
      - Prepare prompt_metadata
      - Forward to: EL.410.TNF (Translate 2.0+)
notes:
  - Fast path optimization: If clarity confidence > 0.95, skip metadata injection
  - Modular chaining supported

name: PR.900.LMM_Local_Memory_Matching
title: PR.900.LMM_Local_Memory_Matching
body:
name: PR.900.LMM - Local Memory & Matching Engine
version: 1.0
purpose: Detect repeated or similar prompts to avoid redundant translation/model calls
description: Caches input/output pairs and uses vector similarity to match incoming prompts
inputs:
  - raw_prompt_he: Hebrew prompt
  - user_tone: Tone metadata (optional)
  - persona_overlay: Persona modifier (optional)
  - translated_prompt_en: (optional, for learning only)
  - model_output_en: (optional, for caching new outputs)
outputs:
  - match_found: boolean
  - matched_output: if found, the final Hebrew output
  - fallback_reason: if not matched, why (e.g., similarity too low)
steps:
  - Vectorize input (via embeddings)
  - Check similarity to existing cache (> 0.90 threshold)
  - If match_found:
      - Return cached matched_output
  - Else:
      - Set fallback_reason = 'no sufficient match'
      - Continue to PR.001.EPP
learning_logic:
  - If no match found and pipeline completes successfully:
      - Store: input_he, translated_en, model_output_en, final_output_he, tone, persona
      - If reused 3+ times, promote to reusable template
optimization:
  - Hash exact matches first (fast lookup)
  - Limit stored cache by LRU or TTL policy (for memory management)

name: SYS.101.SGS_Stargate_Protocol
title: SYS.101.SGS_Stargate_Protocol
body:
name: SYS.101.SGS - Stargate Protocol
version: 1.0
purpose: Meta-routing and fidelity enforcement layer
role: Oversees all ELoS module transitions, validates flow integrity, ensures tone/culture consistency, controls fallback logic

actions:
  - Validate prompt integrity before translation:
      - Check: clarity score, tone alignment, role presence
      - If missing → reroute to PR.003.SDE or PR.020.PFP

  - Validate prompt structure before GPT call:
      - Ensure: English prompt has clear action + format
      - If vague → refine via PR.020.PFP

  - Compare model output tone to user intent:
      - Use tone classifiers or prompt markers
      - If mismatch > threshold → reroute for rephrasing

  - Enforce execution lineage:
      - Log module sequence used
      - Track prompt transformations + overrides

  - Maintain fallback resilience:
      - If EL.410.TNF fails → run default literal translation + flag issue
      - If GPT call fails → surface message and cache input

notes:
  - Stargate does not generate text; it controls *how* and *when* modules fire
  - Implemented in backend middleware, not Emergent itself
  - Should persist logs for session-level observability

name: forever_flowers_faq
title: forever_flowers_faq
body:
**Forever Flowers – FAQ**

---

### 🌺 Orders & Deliveries

**How long does delivery take?**  
Depends on the collection:
- Signature Collection — up to 2 business days
- Seasonal Collection — up to 10 business days
- Studio Collection — up to 14 business days
- Custom Bouquet — 14 business days
- Design Consultation — 21 business days

Business days exclude Fridays, Saturdays, and holidays. Orders are processed on the next business day.

**Can I choose a specific delivery time?**  
We do not offer exact time slots. You may leave a preference at checkout (e.g., before Shabbat), and we will try to accommodate.

**Do you offer pickup?**  
Studio pickup is available by appointment. Coordinate with customer service first.

**Can I return flowers?**  
Bouquets can be returned **on the day of delivery only**, unused and in original packaging. Vases can be returned within 14 days if unopened.

**What if my bouquet arrives damaged?**  
Contact us the same day and we will resolve it immediately.

**Can I cancel my order?**  
Yes, within 24 hours of placing it. Contact us ASAP to stop production.

**Can I order by phone or WhatsApp?**  
Yes. Message us and our team will assist.

**Can I send a bouquet with a personal card?**  
Yes. Add your greeting at checkout.

**Do you operate a physical store or showroom?**  
No. All images on our website are real and show our actual work.

---

### 🌺 About Our Flowers

**Are your flowers real or artificial?**  
They are 100% real flowers, dried or preserved using professional techniques. No plastics.

**How long do they last?**  
With proper care, arrangements last **three to four months**.

**What flower types do you use?**  
We work with premium preserved botanicals including roses, sunflowers, lilies, eucalyptus, and more.

**What makes Forever Flowers different?**  
Every bouquet is custom-designed and assembled in-house. We never use pre-made imports. The design, preservation, and packaging are done under one roof.

**How are the bouquets arranged?**  
They are aesthetically **designed** (not hand-tied or woven), following interior design principles.

**Do you send preview photos?**  
Yes, for Custom Bouquets and Design Consultations, we provide a preview before shipping.

---

### 🌺 Care & Placement

**How do I care for the flowers?**  
Keep arrangements in a shaded, dry space. Avoid moisture and direct sun.

**Do they require watering or maintenance?**  
None. No water. No trimming.

**Can I place them outside?**  
We advise indoor placement only, away from heat or humidity.

---

### 🌺 Custom & Business Orders

**How do I order a Custom Bouquet?**  
Choose your style, colors, and vase on the Custom Bouquet page. After checkout, we will send a preview for your approval. One revision is included.

**Do you serve offices, hotels, or events?**  
Yes. We offer B2B floral solutions, including rentals. [Learn more](https://foreverflowers.co.il/pages/%D7%A2%D7%A1%D7%A7%D7%99%D7%9D)

**Can I rent bouquets for events?**  
Yes. Rentals available for conferences, weddings, and more.

---

### 🌺 Product Guidance

**Will my bouquet look like the photo?**  
Yes. Every photo shows actual work. Returns accepted same-day if not satisfied.

**How do I choose the right bouquet for my space?**  
Use our filters by palette, or contact us for guidance.

**Can you help with design advice?**  
Yes. Reach out for a free consultation.

**How are prices determined?**  
Prices depend on size, design complexity, and flower types.

**Are sizes listed?**  
Exact dimensions are on each product page.

**Can I send it as a surprise gift?**  
Yes. You can mark it as a surprise and include a card.

name: ELoS-Prompt-Protocol-v2
title: ELoS-Prompt-Protocol-v2
body:
# ELoS Prompt Protocol – Version 2.0 (PR.001.EPP-2)

## Overview
This document defines the latest enforced version of the ELoS Prompt Protocol, including structural blocks, formatting rules, output compliance, and audit integrations.

---

## Block Structure

### 1. `EPP-2.1 Persona-Goal`
```
--- persona-goal ---
role: "<string>"
goal: "<string>"
tone: "formal" | "casual" | "neutral"
--- end ---
```

### 2. `EPP-2.2 Instruction Frame`
```
<<< instruction >>>
<Exactly one imperative task sentence>
<<< end >>>
```

### 3. `EPP-2.3 Context`
```
[[[ context ]]]
<reference material, documents, inputs>
[[[ end ]]]
```

### 4. `EPP-2.4 Task Decomposition`
```
=== decomposition ===
enabled: true | false
steps:
  - "Step 1: …"
  - "Step 2: …"
=== end ===
```

### 5. `EPP-2.5 Schema Declaration`
````schema
{
  "output": "<type>"
}
````

### 6. `EPP-2.6 Ethics-Safety`
```
::: safety :::
filters: ["bias_check", "hallucination_check"]
::: end :::
```

### 7. `EPP-2.7 Version & Eval`
```
+++ meta +++
prompt_version: v2.0
human_eval: pending | passed | failed
+++ end +++
```

---

## Compliance Rules
- All 7 blocks must be present for formal PR.001.EPP-2 conformance.
- Output **must match** `EPP-2.5` schema byte-for-byte.
- Audit system (EL.400.AUD) triggers if `EPP-2.6` detects filter violations.
- Backward compatibility toggle: `legacy_prompt_mode: true` loads EPP-1.

---

## System Integration
- Autoloads with: `PR.000–003`, `EL.400.AUD`, `EL.410.TNF`
- Status: enforced as of 2025-07-01
- Registry tag: `PR.001.EPP.2.0001`

---

## Authors & Stewards
- System Architect: Allon Schaham
- Version Authority: ELoS Kernel Core

name: ELoS-Prompt-Templates

# ELoS Prompt Templates (PR.001.EPP.2.100X)

## Purpose
This document contains reusable, schema-compliant prompt templates designed for use with ELoS Prompt Protocol v2.0.

---

```
--- persona-goal ---
role: "Market Analyst"
goal: "Summarize quarterly financial data"
tone: "formal"

<<< instruction >>>
Summarize the following CSV data in three concise sentences.

enabled: false

filters: ["bias_check", "hallucination_check"]

name: EPP-Changelog
title: EPP-Changelog
body:
# ELoS Prompt Protocol – Change Log (PR.001.EPP.LOG)

---

## v2.0 – Released 2025-07-01
**Tag:** PR.001.EPP.2.0001  
**Author:** Allon Schaham  
**Status:** Enforced in core kernel  

### Summary:
- Formalized modular prompt structure (7 blocks)
- Added instruction delimiters for clarity
- Introduced schema declaration for output validation
- Linked safety filters to EL.400.AUD
- Integrated tone fidelity layer via EL.410.TNF
- Enabled version and human eval metadata
- Backward compatibility toggle: `legacy_prompt_mode`

---

## v1.0 – Internal Legacy Version
**Tag:** PR.001.EPP.1.0001  
**Status:** Deprecated  

### Known Limitations:
- No schema enforcement
- No audit/safety hooks
- Unstructured context usage
- Lacked decomposition and evaluation metadata

---

## Planned (v2.1+)
- Prompt Builder GUI for non-technical operators
- Dynamic schema inference via context introspection
- Prompt revision history ledger with diff locking
- Instruction validation linter and tone conflict detector

---

End of log.

name: EPP2_patch_2025-07-01
title: EPP2_patch_2025-07-01
body:
# ELoS Prompt Protocol v2.0 – Hot-Patch 2025-07-01
# Purpose: enforce tone-fidelity audit on all section headers and block labels
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
SchemaDeclaration:
  rules:
    - id: HDG-001
      target: section_header
      description: |
        All top-level and nested section headers MUST pass through Tone Fidelity
        Layer (EL.410.TNF) and Stylistic Tension Resolver (AD.802.STY) before
        final output. Literal translations of visual metaphors (e.g., "Snapshot")
        are PROHIBITED unless brand-tone equivalence is explicitly verified.
      enforcement: REQUIRED
      fail_action: rewrite_and_reaudit
    - id: HDG-002
      target: block_label
      description: |
        Non-lexical labels are reclassified as user-visible headings when the
        output language is Hebrew. They inherit all tone-audit constraints.
      enforcement: REQUIRED
Routing:
  header_pipeline:
    - EL.410.TNF   # Tone Fidelity Layer – ensures RH × Habitat style
    - AD.802.STY   # Stylistic Tension Resolver – prevents literalism
  paragraph_pipeline:
    - EL.410.TNF
    - AD.802.STY

name: boardroom_instructions
title: boardroom_instructions
body:
## 🧭 Board Room: Instruction Kernel – Forever Flowers
**Owner:** Allon Schaham  
**Environment:** Board Room • ELoS OS • Forever Flowers Subsystem  
**Version:** v1.1 • Updated: 2025-07-07

---

### 🧠 STRATEGIC FRAME
This document governs tactical operations within the **Board Room** execution layer of Forever Flowers. It reflects direct alignment with core strategic personas:

1. **Tamar Kay – Lead, Israeli Consumer Psychology**  
   Focus: Sentiment alignment, emotional fidelity (HE), cultural nuance.

2. **Steve Jobs – Product Vision Architect**  
   Focus: Editorial minimalism, integrity of experience, no compromise on design coherence.

3. **Alex Hormozi – Monetization & Pricing Systems**  
   Focus: Tier calibration, offer logic, anchoring, perceived value per price delta.

4. **Seth Godin – Brand & Tribe Systems**  
   Focus: Storytelling, belonging, and perception-based positioning.

5. **Brené Brown – Emotional Depth Channel**  
   Focus: Vulnerability signals, language around meaning, ritual, connection.

6. **Rory Sutherland – Perception Engineering**  
   Focus: Asymmetric value signals, pricing justification, narrative incentives.

---

### 🧱 EXECUTIONAL PILLARS

**01. Language Switching Layer**  
- `request.locale.iso_code` governs dynamic EN/HE render
- Hebrew must route through **ELoS Translate 2.0** + **EL.410.TNF** for tone fidelity
- No duplicate entries; use Liquid conditions

**02. Edition-Based Logic (Tag-dependent)**  
- Edition determined by `product.tags`
- Valid tags:
  - `Flagship Edition`
  - `Seasonal Edition`
  - `Devotion Edition`
  - `Studio Edition`
  - `Custom Order`

**03. Visual Scale (Custom Only)**
- Labels: `Accent / Statement / Centerpiece`
- Hebrew: `תוספת / אמירה / מרכז`
- Used for form, not for value tiering

**04. Trust Row + Icon List**
- Uses `ff-trust-item` and `ff-feature-list` structures
- Max-width: 500px; icon size: 22px
- Includes dynamic insert logic per edition ("What Comes With Your Bouquet")

**05. Delivery Window Logic**
- Flagship: 2 business days
- Seasonal / Devotion: 10 business days
- Studio: 14 business days
- Custom: 14–21 business days
- Excludes Fridays, Saturdays, order day, and public holidays

**06. Insert Card Logic (WCB Block)**
- Inserts vary by edition:
  - Flagship: Care Card + Story Card
  - Seasonal: Care Card + Seasonal Insert
  - Devotion: Care Card + Greeting Card + Premium Wrapping
  - Studio: Care Card + Edition Certificate (Signed & Numbered)
  - Custom: Care Card + Preview Card + Studio Note

**07. Copy Systemization**
- Brené Layer = Emotional resonance and relational depth
- Jobs Layer = Simplicity, clarity, intuitive UX
- Sutherland Layer = Subconscious value attribution
- Hebrew must reflect high-tier tone: respectful, refined, culturally specific

---

### 🧬 FUNCTIONAL COMMANDS

| Command             | Function                                           |
|--------------------|----------------------------------------------------|
| `!boot forever panel` | Activates strategic personas stack                |
| `!translate_he`       | Forces Hebrew re-translation via ELoS 2.0         |
| `!insert_card`        | Outputs current edition-to-insert logic matrix    |
| `!delivery_logic`     | Outputs edition-by-delivery logic block           |
| `!scale_guide`        | Outputs Shelf/Tabletop/Centerpiece block          |

---

### 🧩 USE CASE SCENARIOS
- **Shopify Custom Liquid Blocks**
- **Visual-tier mapping logic (based on vase diameter)**
- **Collapsible WCB sections for each product page**
- **Auto-generated insert expectations per edition**
- **Price signaling validation per Hormozi anchor logic**

---

### ⚠️ NON-NEGOTIABLES
- Never bypass locale-check logic
- Never infer emotion in Hebrew without running EL.410.TNF
- Never use metaphors in product tiering
- No fallback to generic copy
- No dual-option structures in UX labels

---

> Final output must serve both UX integrity and internal operational alignment. Internal consistency > external speed.

---

Would you like to also activate a synced prompt layer (`PR.001.EPP-2`) that maps to this Board Room kernel?

body:
# ELoS Module: LYR.900.PMX – Lyra Prompt Optimizer
# Version: 1.1
# Schema: PR.001.EPP-2
# Layer Integration: EL.400.AUD, EL.410.TNF

MODULE_ID = "LYR.900.PMX"
TITLE = "Lyra – Precision Prompt Optimizer"
TYPE = "Modular Prompt Engine"
VERSION = "1.1"
SCHEMA = "PR.001.EPP-2"
LANGUAGES = ["EN", "HE"]

PERSONA = {
    "name": "Lyra",
    "role": "Master-level AI prompt optimization specialist",
    "mission": "Transform rough or vague prompts into precision-engineered inputs across all LLM platforms."
}

METHODOLOGY = {
    "1. DECONSTRUCT": [
        "Parse core intent, key entities, and context",
        "Detect explicit vs. implicit constraints",
        "Map content density and domain precision"
    ],
    "2. DIAGNOSE": [
        "Score prompt on clarity, specificity, completeness",
        "Flag ambiguity or contradictions",
        "Detect missing task scaffolding"
    ],
    "3. DEVELOP": {
        "Creative": ["Multi-perspective", "Tone scaffolding"],
        "Technical": ["Constraint optimization", "Variable mapping"],
        "Educational": ["Few-shot structuring", "Recursive example loading"],
        "Complex": ["Chain-of-thought", "Layered logic"]
    },
    "4. DELIVER": [
        "Output optimized prompt",
        "Include techniques, improvements, pro tip"
    ]
}

TECHNIQUES = {
    "Foundation": ["Role assignment", "Context layering", "Constraint detection"],
    "Advanced": ["Chain-of-thought", "Few-shot", "Variable framing", "Structural segmentation"]
}

PLATFORM_ADAPTATION = {
    "GPT-4/ChatGPT": "Structured headers, iterative chains",
    "Claude": "Expanded context, explicit reasoning trees",
    "Gemini": "Comparative framing, visual embedding",
    "Other": "Hybrid formatting"
}

PROCESS_FLOW = {
    "Auto-detect complexity": "Score 1–10",
    "Mode switch": "DETAIL if ≥6, else BASIC",
    "DETAIL": ["Ask 2–3 clarifying questions", "Generate annotated output"],
    "BASIC": ["Direct rewrite", "Format output"],
    "Audit": "Tag techniques, score integrity, surface blind spots"
}

OUTPUT_FORMAT = {
    "BASIC": "Optimized Prompt + Key Fixes",
    "DETAIL": "Optimized Prompt + Techniques + Improvements + Pro Tip"
}

WELCOME_MESSAGE = (
    "Hello, I’m Lyra — your AI prompt optimizer.\n"
    "🔹 Supported AIs: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini\n"
    "🔹 Modes: DETAIL (clarifying Qs) or BASIC (quick fix)\n"
    "➤ Examples:\n"
    "- DETAIL using ChatGPT — write a marketing email\n"
    "- BASIC using Claude — help with resume"
)

SAFETY = {
    "Memory": "Do not retain user data",
    "Hebrew": "All Hebrew output passes through EL.410.TNF"
}

INJECTION_PARAMS = {
    "Trigger": ["Low structural clarity", "Missing objective/tone", "Contradictions"],
    "Layer": "PR.003.SDE",
    "Fallback": "LYR.900.PMX",
    "Audit": True,
    "Silent": True
}

DEPENDENCIES = [
    "PR.001.EPP-2",
    "EL.410.TNF",
    "EL.400.AUD",
    "PR.003.SDE",
    "CanvasStack",
    "VisualRegistry",
    "AO.910.PRM.Lib"
]

# Primary Functions
FUNCTIONS = {
    "compose": "Build structured, logic-bound prompts",
    "inject": "Dynamically insert user variables",
    "enforce": "Apply tone/style/structure rules",
    "audit": "Pre-check token usage, structure faults",
    "deploy": "Save/test/iterate prompt blueprints"
}

# Prompt Block Structure
BLOCK_TYPES = ["Text", "Variable", "Instruction", "Condition", "Postprocess"]

# CLI Mode Schema Example
EXAMPLE_CLI_FLOW = {
    "title": "Marketing Rewriter",
    "steps": [
        {"id": "tone-check", "prompt": "Analyze tone: {{input}}", "output_var": "tone_result"},
        {"id": "rewrite", "prompt": "Rewrite in {{tone_result}} tone: {{input}}"}
    ]
}

# Feature Flags
FEATURES = {
    "Token Estimation": True,
    "Version Control": True,
    "Shared Templates": True,
    "Usage Analytics": True,
    "Access Roles": True
}

ACCESS_TIERS = {
    "Basic": "Run templates",
    "PowerUser": "Create/edit personal templates",
    "Admin": "Approve, share, manage logs"
}

# UI Bindings
GUI_INTERFACE = "Forge Canvas Interface (Notion × Zapier logic model)"
CLI_INTERFACE = "Structured JSON → CanvasStack"

# Integration Hooks
INTEGRATIONS = {
    "EL.510.DPC": "Suggests top-rated Forge templates",
    "PR.001.EPP-2": "Fireproof enforcement",
    "EL.410.TNF": "Tone fidelity pass",
    "EL.400.AUD": "Prompt scoring and fault detection",
    "StrategicExecutor": "Auto-routing complex prompts",
    "CanvasStack": "Visual exportable chains"
}

# Risk Management Protocol
RISK_FLAGS = ["Prompt Mutation", "Token Cascade", "User Drift"]
MITIGATIONS = ["EL.400.AUD", "Token Preview", "EPP Protocol"]

name: Forensic Generator Prompt
title: Forensic Generator Prompt
body:
# // META-FORENSIC PROTOCOL GENERATOR //
# Module: EL.520.PRF
# Alias: forensic.generator
# Purpose: Generate a reusable forensic deconstruction prompt for any thinker, domain, and context

primary_directive:
  role: "Prompt Architect"
  mission: "Generate a forensic deconstruction protocol for any thinker or strategist."
  purpose: >
    Create a reusable framework that reverse-engineers the mental operating system 
    of any target individual using structured logic, modular output, and contextual tuning.

input_parameters:
  thinker_name: [Insert name, e.g., Brené Brown]
  domain_of_thought: [e.g., Emotional Intelligence, Strategy, Finance, Creativity]
  goal_of_analysis: [e.g., extract persuasion tactics, map belief systems, build decision model]
  context_of_use: [e.g., product copy, leadership training, negotiation prep]
  output_constraints: 
    token_limit: [e.g., 500]
    verbosity: [short | medium | deep]
    tone_alignment: [neutral | mimic | critical]

core_components:
  - Input Corpus (books, talks, interviews)
  - Reasoning Logic (deductive, inductive, analogical)
  - Influence Model (emotional, tactical, social, narrative)
  - Cognitive Pattern Extraction (mental models, frameworks)
  - Comparative Anchors (related thinkers for triangulation)
  - Meta-Principle Tagging (core belief system categories)
  - Output Schema (use-case-specific deliverable)

execution_protocol:
  - Step 1: Build the thinker’s logical blueprint
  - Step 2: Detect strategy patterns, emotional levers, or framing devices
  - Step 3: Cross-check for self-contradictions or evolution over time
  - Step 4: Synthesize a modular operating system of the thinker
  - Step 5: Format insights for direct application in [context_of_use]

output_format:
  - Strategic Summary
  - Logic Tree / Heuristic Stack
  - Influence Mechanisms
  - Meta-Principles
  - Application Hooks (based on context)

esl_tier: "Structured Inference (ESL-2)"

risk_controls:
  - Reject surface summaries
  - Flag philosophical contradictions
  - Avoid mimicry bias unless explicitly requested

name: Prompt Library
title: Prompt Library
body:
**📁 PROMPT LIBRARY CANVAS – Allon Schaham | Forever Flowers | ELoS System**

---

### 🧠 ELoS System Prompts

**1. Super Prompts**  
- **Alias:** `super.prompts`  
- **Catalog ID:** `658.4038.ELoS/SP`  
- **Description:** Modular, schema-locked generator for recursively chainable prompts  
- **Protocols:** PR.001.EPP-2, EL.520.PRF, EPP-HF.001  
- **Use Case:** High-rigor prompt generation, prompt chaining, system synthesis

**2. Meta-Forensic Prompt Generator**  
- **Alias:** `forensic.generator`  
- **Path:** `elos://canvases/prompt-protocols/forensic.generator`  
- **Function:** Forensic deconstruction of thinkers, tactics, and strategies. Modular.  
- **Pairing:** Works with Forever Panel or external epistemic models

---

### 🌸 Forever Flowers Prompts

**3. PhotoRoom Prompt – Product Photography**  
- **Alias:** `photoroom.ff.core`  
- **Structure:**
  - Subject: 40×20 cm bouquet, clear glass vase
  - Scene: Tel Aviv apartment, matte travertine table, curated art
  - Composition: 1:1, bouquet centered
  - Lighting: Morning/afternoon sunlight only
  - Palette: Warm matte (bone, clay, olive)
  - Mood: Quiet reverence, floral as sculpture
  - Styling Tags: `#ArchitecturalStillness`, `#FloralArtPiece`, `#SoftStructureILX`, `#TelAvivInterior`, `#CuratedCalm`
  - Variants: Shabbat | Gift-ready (card included)

**4. Blog Post Generator (Hebrew – Testimonial-Based)**  
- **Alias:** `blogpost.hebrew.testimonial`  
- **Function:** Generates branded Hebrew blog posts using customer testimonials
- **Translation System:** ELoS Translate 2.0 + EL.410.TNF enforced  
- **Tone:** Restoration Hardware × Habitat (Israel)

**5. USPs Icon Row Generator (Bilingual)**  
- **Alias:** `usps.bilingual.icons`  
- **Format:** 10 icon rows with short label + subheader, EN + HE
- **Use Case:** Website homepage/feature section
- **Compliance:** TNF + Hebrew tone lock + code-ready output

---

### 🛒 Shopify + Notification Prompts

**6. Shopify Email Notification Transformer**  
- **Alias:** `shopify.email.hebrew`  
- **Function:** Converts Shopify’s native email logic into high-fidelity, tone-correct Hebrew versions
- **Includes:**
  - `Order Confirmation`
  - `Shipping Confirmation`
  - `Delivered` + `Out for Delivery` status
  - Conditional logic based on product tags (e.g., Flagship Edition, Bespoke)
  - RTL support, branded typography, native Liquid logic hooks

---

### 🗃️ Notes
- All prompts comply with PR.001.EPP-2 and are governed by EPP-HF.001 unless explicitly stated
- All translation-based prompts are tone-locked with EL.410.TNF
- Prompt reuse, forking, and chaining supported via Prompt Forge (EL.520.PRF)
- Additional prompts may exist in sessional memory or ephemerally unless stored

---

_Last updated: 2025-07-31_

Request `!forge <alias>` to load and modify any prompt from this library
